title: How Can I Help You - Michael Wheeler
meta_description: Member of Parliament for Worsley & Eccles
text_excerpt: How Can I Help You - Michael Wheeler Skip to main content Michael Wheeler Member of Parliament for Worsley & Eccles Join Get Involved Donate About Michael How Can I Help You Personal Casework Contact Me My Work In Worsley & Eccles Constituency Surgery Information Upcoming Events Latest News In Parliament Committees APPGs Visiting Parliament More Search Search the website Search Menu How Can I Help You As your Member of Parliament, I receive thousands of enquiries each year from constituents across Worsley & Eccles. I’m committed to offering help and support wherever possible – whether that’s through individual casework or by addressing broader national policy concerns. I want to make our constituency a great place to work and live, so supporting local community groups, sports teams and schools is key for me. Please do get in touch if you would like to let me know about any groups in your community and the good work that they do.
